items.title: New: Reviewing the 2025-26 season of Andre Drummond, who remarkably found his three-point stroke in his 14th year in the NBA but could not quite stabilize the Sixers’ backup center spot.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
New: Reviewing the 2025-26 season of Andre Drummond, who remarkably found his three-point stroke in his 14th year in the NBA but could not quite stabilize the Sixers’ backup center spot.

Can the Sixers upgrade this summer?
